title: 22Pcs Toy Cars with 8 Roadblock, Metal Shell Race Car Set for Kids, Mini Pull Back Playset, Micro Machines Vehicles Toys, Christmas Birthday Party Gifts for 3 4 5 6 7 8 Year Old Boys & Girls
features: Toy Car Set: This set includes 22 mini pull-back cars and 8 roadblocks, featuring a mix of vibrant colours and designs. Each set is packed at random, offering a fun surprise every time!

Metal Shell : Each car has a metal body and a plastic base, built to handle countless races and adventures. The rounded corners are thoughtfully designed to help prevent little ones from getting scratched.

Endless Fun: These mini pull-back cars are great for developing hand-eye coordination and early learning skills. Perfectly sized at 2.67 inches, they’re easy for small hands to grip. Simply pull them back and watch them zoom off!
Handy Storage Bag: Comes with a convenient storage bag, making it easy to tidy up and take the cars on the go.
Perfect Gift Idea: A fantastic gift for birthdays, Christmas, Easter, party bags, mini car collections, classroom rewards, or any special occasion – sure to bring joy to children of all ages.
description: From the manufacturer Metal Shell And Rounded Corner Design The shell of toy cars is thin metal with elasticity, the bottom of the car is plastic, ensuring they can withstand many races and adventures. The rounded corner design can prevent children from scratching. Super Fun Mini pull-back cars help improve hand-eye coordination and early preschool development skills. Just pull back and you can make the car travel a long distance. with a storage bag for easy storage and portability Perfect Gift for Kids! This toy car set is the perfect gift for kids for birthdays, Christmas, Thanksgiving, weddings and other holidays, or as a party favor, mini car collection, or classroom reward.
